questionHtml: Explain why the work done by the gas during the isothermal expansion AB is less than the work done on the gas during the adiabatic compression BC.
markschemeHtml:
area under curve AB is less than area under curve BC ✓

 

Do not allow ECF from part (b)

meta.title: Explain why the work done by the gas during the isothermal expansion AB is less than the work done on the gas during the adiabatic compression BC.
